column14:
About this gig
Stop wasting time on repetitive manual tasks. Let me build your next professional Python automation script.

As a Senior Platform Engineer with enterprise experience (Samsung, LG), I dont just "write scripts", I build robust, secure, and scalable python automation tools. Whether you need advanced python development, API integrations, or custom DevOps utilities, I deliver production-grade code wrapped in Docker for seamless deployment.

What can I build for you?
Python Automation: Auto-generate reports (CSV/Excel/PDF), sync data, and automate email workflows.
Web Scraping: Extract data from websites (Selenium/BS4) into DB/CSV.
API Integration: Connect Slack, Google Sheets, Jira, AWS, & OpenAI with custom connectors.
DevOps Utilities: CLI tools, backup scripts, Cron jobs, and system monitoring bots.
Data Processing: Clean and analyze large datasets with Pandas/NumPy.

Why Choose Me?
Enterprise Standards: Over 5 years of infrastructure experience and a Technicians Certificate.
Clean Code: Modular, documented (PEP8), and easy to maintain.
Security First: I ensure API keys and sensitive data are handled with strict security standards.

Do you need data from a website extracted quickly and accurately? Im here to help with my expertise in Python web scraping!

With several years of experience and multiple completed projects, I can provide efficient, clean, and structured data scraping for any website. Whether you need product data, contact lists, or any other type of information, I can deliver results tailored to your needs.

What I offer:

Web scraping for all types of websites (e-commerce, directories, news, etc.)
Data extraction delivered in your preferred format (CSV, Excel, JSON)
Scraping using Python with BeautifulSoup, Selenium, and Scrapy
Handling of dynamic content and JavaScript-heavy websites
 
What I need from you:

The URL(s) of the websites/pages you need scraped
Specific data fields you want extracted
Desired output format (CSV, Excel, JSON, etc.)

Why choose me?

Extensive experience with Python and web scraping tools
Proven track record with completed scraping projects (available on request)

Clear communication to ensure you get exactly what you need

column7: Custom ETL solution to dynamically load unlimited flat files into a SQL Database. (Custom pricing)
column12:
10 query included

column13: I will develop your etl solution for microsoft sql server
column14:
Dynamic ETL (Extract Transform and Load)
If you need to load flat files, usually CSV (.csv = comma-separated values) or tab-delimited values (like an Excel file) this is the solution for you.
I have evolved, enhanced, improved, and optimized this code design over the last 20 years.
My dynamic, metadata-driven design works with any table schema and almost every datatype.
I will load flat file data from your hard drive into your Microsoft SQL Server.
I use my own proprietary logic that utilizes a common set of dynamic stored procedures, functions, and views that rely on internal metadata to load an unlimited number of flat files into an unlimited number of tables, all using one set of generic logic.
No need to develop individual processes for different file structures.
No need to build SSIS (SQL Server Integration Services) packages to load the files.
No need to purchase expensive third-party software to accomplish your ETL tasks.
This solution also includes custom business rules to handle data-specific data handling rules and is smart enough to know what has been imported and what flat files are new.

Please contact me for custom pricing as your scenario is unique.
column15:
SQL Server data automation expert!
